acts.tx: Depart Dhaka DAC — UL190, SriLankan Airlines, Terminal 1
Land Colombo CMB. Clear immigration + bags. Out by ~4:30 PM.
Bus from outside arrivals → Pettah Central Bus Stand, Colombo. ~1 hr. LKR 150–200/person.
Bus: Pettah → Kandy Town. Every 20–30 min. ~3 hrs. LKR 200–250/person.
Tuk-tuk: Kandy bus stand → Kandy City Village. LKR 250–350. Let hotel know you are arriving late.
Check in: Kandy City Village, Kandy.
Kottu roti from a night stall nearby. LKR 400–600. Early rest.
Hoppers + coconut sambol at local kade. LKR 250–350/person.
Kandy Lake loop walk. Free. ~45 min. Calm morning start.
Natha Devale + Vishnu Devale — 14th-century shrines by the lake. Free. Remove shoes.
Temple of the Tooth Relic — noon pooja. LKR 2,000/person. Cover knees + shoulders. Arrive 15 min early.
Rice + curry lunch at local restaurant. LKR 400–600.
Kandy Bazaar — spices, batik, street food, local life. Free.
Kandyan Cultural Show at YMBA Hall — drums, traditional dance, fire-walking. LKR 600–800/person. Buy at door.
Dinner — street food near Dalada Veediya or Thambapanni Collective. LKR 500–800.
The Pub or Empire Pub on Dalada Veediya. Open till midnight.
Quick tea + biscuits. Kiosks near Kandy bus stand open from 5:30 AM.
Bus: Kandy Goods Shed Bus Stand → Dambulla. ~2 hrs. LKR 150–200/person.
Tuk-tuk: Dambulla → Sigiriya. 20 min. LKR 700–900 round-trip with wait. Fix price before boarding.
Sigiriya Rock Fortress. Bangladesh = SAARC — show passport for ~$20/person (vs $35 full rate). ~1.5 hrs to summit: frescoes, Mirror Wall, Lion's Paw, 360° views.
Lunch at local kade near Sigiriya. LKR 400–600.
Pidurangala Rock — LKR 1,000/person, 10 min tuk-tuk from Sigiriya. Top-down aerial view of Sigiriya. 45-min climb, far fewer crowds, better photo angle.
Bus: Dambulla → Kandy. Arrive ~5:00 PM.
Light dinner. Pack bags tonight for tomorrow's move to Ella.
Breakfast. Check out of Kandy City Village by 10:00 AM.
Bus: Kandy Goods Shed Bus Stand → Nuwara Eliya. ~2–2.5 hrs. LKR 250–350/person. Road climbs steadily through tea estates — genuinely beautiful.
Nuwara Eliya stopover (~2 hrs). Gregory Lake walk (free). Pedro or Mackwoods Tea Factory tour — LKR 500–700/person. Colonial hill station with cool mountain air.
Quick lunch in Nuwara Eliya town. LKR 400–600.
Bus: Nuwara Eliya → Ella. ~2.5–3 hrs. LKR 250–350/person. Through Haputale — highland scenery the whole way.
Arrive Ella. Tuk-tuk to Ella Odyssey Inn. LKR 250–350.
Check in: Ella Odyssey Inn. Check-in from 15:00.
Dinner on Ella main street. LKR 800–1,200.
Retro Bar or rooftop cafe. Small town, easy evening.
Breakfast at hillside cafe. LKR 400–600.
Little Adam's Peak hike. Free. Easy 1.5 hrs return. 360° views over Ella Gap. Go early — cooler and quieter.
Nine Arch Bridge — 15-min walk from town. Free. Wait for a train to pass through the arch (~2–3 hr intervals). Most photographed spot in Ella.
Lunch on Ella main street. LKR 500–800.
Tuk-tuk to Ravana Waterfalls. 3 km. LKR 300–400 round trip. Entry LKR 200/person.
Back in Ella. Rooftop cafe, valley sunset.
Dinner + Ella bars. Retro Bar, Dream Cafe. LKR 800–1,200.
Breakfast + check out of Ella Odyssey Inn by 11:00 AM.
Bus: Ella → Wellawaya. ~35–45 min. LKR 60–100/person.
Bus: Wellawaya → Colombo Pettah. ~5.5 hrs. LKR 350–450/person. Frequent departures throughout the morning.
Arrive Colombo Pettah. Tuk-tuk to Grand Oriental Hotel. LKR 300–450.
Check in: Grand Oriental Hotel. Check-in from 14:00.
Colombo Fort walk — Dutch colonial buildings, Old Parliament, Lighthouse Clock Tower. Free.
Jami Ul-Alfar Mosque (Red Mosque) — candy-striped Indo-Saracenic architecture. Free. Dress modestly.
Pettah Market evening — street food, street life.
Dinner: Nana's Restaurant, Pettah — authentic Sri Lankan. LKR 500–700/person.
Colombo 3 nightlife: tuk-tuk to Cricket Club Cafe, Stack or Upstairs Colombo. Open till 2 AM.
Hoppers from roadside stall near hotel. LKR 200–300.
Train: Colombo Fort → Aluthgama. Southern Coastal Line — 100% operational. ~1.5–2 hrs. LKR 120–180/person. Ocean views along the coast.
Tuk-tuk: Aluthgama station → Bentota Beach. LKR 250–350.
Bentota Beach — white sand, calm turquoise water. Swim and unwind.
Grilled fish + rice at beach shack. LKR 700–1,000/plate.
Madu River boat tour from the jetty. ~1.5 hrs. LKR 2,000–2,500 for the boat. Mangroves, monitor lizards, mugger crocodiles, cinnamon island, birds.
Train: Aluthgama → Colombo Fort. LKR 120–180/person. ~1.5–2 hrs.
Gangaramaya Temple — lit beautifully at night. LKR 300/person. Thai, Chinese, Indian architecture blend.
Final dinner: Dutch Hospital Shopping Precinct — walkable from hotel. LKR 1,000–1,500.
Last night out — Dutch Hospital bars or Colombo 3. Home by midnight.
Pack everything. Set 4:30 AM alarm. Book airport taxi through hotel tonight.
Wake up.
Pre-booked taxi: Grand Oriental Hotel → Bandaranaike Airport CMB. ~45 min. LKR 3,000–4,500. Book night before through hotel.
Arrive CMB. Check-in + security. Terminal 1, SriLankan Airlines UL189.
Flight UL189 departs CMB.
Land Dhaka DAC — Terminal 1, Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport.

budget.note: Airport bus · Pettah→Kandy · Dambulla bus return · Sigiriya tuk-tuk · Kandy→NE→Ella buses · Ella→Wellawaya→Colombo · coastal train return · misc tuk-tuks · airport taxi
Sigiriya SAARC ~$20×2 (12,800) · Temple of Tooth 4,000 · Pidurangala 2,000 · Kandyan Show 1,400 · Tea factory 1,400 · Ravana Falls 400
Street food + local kades, 2026 prices, ~LKR 2,500/day for two
Kandy City Village LKR 19,379 (3 nts) · Ella Odyssey Inn LKR 16,221 (2 nts) · Grand Oriental Hotel LKR 16,125 (2 nts)
Excludes flights. Add personal spending + nightlife buffer ~LKR 5,000–10,000.

notes.title: Transport
notes.text: All hill country travel by road (bus) — Kandy, Nuwara Eliya, Ella roads fully operational.

notes.title: Coastal Train
notes.text: Southern Coastal Line train (Colombo–Bentota) is fully operational with regular daily services.

notes.title: Cash
notes.text: Carry cash everywhere. ATMs in Kandy and Colombo; limited in Ella. Change money at Colombo or Kandy.

notes.title: Dress Code
notes.text: All religious sites: cover knees + shoulders. Keep a sarong each. Negotiate tuk-tuks before boarding.
